## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this needed?

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Documentation or screenshots updated when user-visible behavior changed

## Privacy and compatibility

- [ ] No API keys, private vocabulary, media, databases, or local paths are included
- [ ] Existing local data and uploads remain compatible, or migration notes are included

## Screenshots

Add before/after screenshots for interface changes, or write “Not applicable.”
